name: WLF_CONTENT_DEFAULT_RULES
description: Table to store learning content default rules.

columns.Name: CONTENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: EFFORT_CALCULATION_RULE
columns.Comments: Actual effort calculation rule

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Referece to a learning item. eg: Learning Catalog Profile.

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of the content

columns.Name: RECORDED_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Recorded Attempts

columns.Name: MAX_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Max attempts to retry content ie assessments

columns.Name: RECORDED_ATTEMPT_REVIEW
columns.Comments: Represents setting for recorded attempt review Attempt Review

columns.Name: LRNR_ATTEMPT_REVIEW_CONDITION
columns.Comments: Indicates when attempts can be reviewed

columns.Name: DISABLE_ATTEMPTS_OVERRIDE
columns.Comments: This column represents if attemps can be overriden

columns.Name: COMPLETION_RULE
columns.Comments: This represents Completion rule

columns.Name: ALLOW_BROWSE_CONDITION
columns.Comments: This column represents "Learner to browse content after completing activity" is allowed or not.

columns.Name: SCORED_CONTENT_COMPLETION
columns.Comments: Strategy to determine lesson completion status of a scored content

columns.Name: SCORE_VIEW_RULE
columns.Comments: This column represents Score View Rule

columns.Name: DISABLE_COMPLETION_OVERRIDE
columns.Comments: This column represents if completion rule can be overriden

columns.Name: ALLOW_FWD_SCRUB
columns.Comments: Tihs column represents Allow forward scrub

columns.Name: COMPLETION_THRESHOLD
columns.Comments: Percentage of video that a learner must watch to get credit for completion

columns.Name: SHOW_FEEDBACK_TO_LEARNER
columns.Comments: Should learner be able to view questionnaire feedback ?

columns.Name: OBSRVR_RECORDED_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Observer recorded attempts type.

columns.Name: OBSRVR_MAX_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Observer max attempts to retry checklist.

columns.Name: OBSRVR_RECORDED_ATTEMPT_REVIEW
columns.Comments: Represents observer setting for recorded attempt review

columns.Name: OBSRVR_ATMPT_REVIEW_COND_LRNR
columns.Comments: Indicates condition when observer attempts can be reviewed by learner.

columns.Name: DISABLE_ATTEMPTS_OVERRIDE_OBSR
columns.Comments: This column represents if observer attemps can be overriden

columns.Name: OBSRVR_ALLOW_BROWSE_CONDITION
columns.Comments: This column represents "Observers to browse content after completing activity" is allowed or not.

columns.Name: OBSERVER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores lookup code representing type of observer

columns.Name: ROUTING_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores lookup-code to represent the actual type of observer chosen. ie., type of Representative or Manager Hierarchy

columns.Name: HIERARCHY_LEVELS
columns.Comments: Stores hierarchy levels for the routing type selected.

columns.Name: ALLOW_REASSIGN_CHECKLIST
columns.Comments: Allow reassign checklist

columns.Name: OBSRVR_SHOW_FEEDBACK_TO_LRNR
columns.Comments: Flag that represents if learner can view observer feedback

columns.Name: DISABLE_COMPL_OVERRIDE_OBSR
columns.Comments: This column represents if completion rule can be overriden

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
